articles.title: The end of the ISS is looming, and the US could have a big problem - CNN
articles.description: As NASA aims to return astronauts to the moon, a multibillion-dollar question mark looms: What will the space agency do when the International Space Station retires?

articles.title: iOS 26.3.1 (a): Apple’s Hidden iPhone Update Recommended For Hundreds Of Millions Of Users - Forbes
articles.description: The latest iPhone update has arrived and it’s different from previous updates. Here’s why and what to do about it.

articles.title: Gran Turismo 7 Was an Inspiration for Microsoft Flight Sim 2024's PSVR2 Mode, Coming Soon - Push Square
Microsoft Is Finally Ready to Make Windows 11 Less Terrible After Bloating It With AI Crap - Gizmodo
articles.description: Less Copilot, better search, and more taskbar customization are apparently in the pipeline.

articles.title: iOS 26.4 will automatically turn on strict security feature for all iPhones - 9to5Mac
articles.description: iOS 26.4 is the next big iPhone release, and Apple plans to enable a key security feature by default in the update: Stolen Device Protection.

articles.title: Apple explains why M5 chips have three different core types in new interview - 9to5Mac
articles.description: Apple explains M5's three core types: super cores for single-thread tasks, performance cores for multi-threading, and efficiency cores.
